## Epic

Page Design Issues (Dummy Data Only)

## Description

- Create avatar component with placeholder, initials, and image
- Build mock file upload flow with progress and cancellation
- Add simple crop UI for square avatars (mock processing)
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Tokens per Issue 3
  - Avatar sizes: 24/32/40/64
  - Upload dropzone keyboard accessible; focus/hover states consistent
  - Crop handles 8–12px hit area

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Avatar component variants
- [ ] Mock upload with progress and cancel
- [ ] Crop UI works for square outputs
- [ ] PR includes screenshots and demo GIF
